title: BEM-1209 object integrity
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_object_passport_integrity.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

PASSPORTS = Path("governance/objects/object_passports.json")
CONTOURS = {"C1", "C2", "C3"}


def validate(path=PASSPORTS):
    data = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    objects = data.get("objects", [])
    ids = {item.get("id") for item in objects}
    required_ids = {"GD", "DIR-C1", "DIR-C2", "DIR-C3", "CUR-C1", "CUR-C2", "CUR-C3"}
    missing_ids = sorted(required_ids - ids)
    if missing_ids:
        errors.append(f"missing required object ids: {missing_ids}")
    for item in objects:
        obj_id = item.get("id", "UNKNOWN")
        reports_to = item.get("reports_to")
        if obj_id != "GD" and reports_to not in ids:
            errors.append(f"{obj_id}: reports_to target missing: {reports_to}")
        contour = item.get("contour")
        if contour and contour not in CONTOURS:
            errors.append(f"{obj_id}: invalid contour {contour}")
        if item.get("prompt_ref") and not Path(item["prompt_ref"]).exists():
            errors.append(f"{obj_id}: prompt_ref missing on disk")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS object_passport_integrity")
